# nerdctl_container_export (Action)

Exports a container's filesystem as a tar archive with `nerdctl export`. The archive is written on the target host, not the machine running Terraform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "nerdctl_container_export" "backup" {
  config {
    container = "app"
    output    = "/var/backups/app.tar" # written on the target host
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container` (String) Container name or ID to export.
- `output` (String) Path on the target host to write the tar archive to.
